title: Peppery Chewy Syrian Kielbasa Casserole
description: A vibrant onepot casserole featuring smoky salmon strips, chickpeas, and bell peppers, finished with a quick broil for a peppery, chewy bite.

ingredients.name: Smoked salmon strips
ingredients.notes: use plant‑based kielbasa for vegetarian option

instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F) and lightly grease a 9×9‑inch baking dish or heavy skillet.
Heat olive oil over medium heat. Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3–4 minutes.
Add sliced bell peppers and cook until slightly softened, 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, crushed red pepper flakes, and dried oregano; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Fold in tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes to deepen the flavor.
Add salmon strips, cooked chickpeas, and vegetable broth. Bring to a gentle simmer, season with salt and pepper, and cook for 6–8 minutes until flavors meld.
Transfer the mixture to the prepared dish, cover with parchment or foil, and place in the oven. Broil uncovered for 3–4 minutes until the top is lightly browned and bubbly.
Remove from oven, let stand for 5 minutes, then sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving.
